description: This file defines the main application widget for a Flutter app called 'Masalcı'. It sets up the MaterialApp with theme configurations and specifies 'HomeScreen' as the home widget.

classes.name: MasalciApp
classes.description: A StatelessWidget that builds the root MaterialApp widget for the Flutter application.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree for the MasalciApp, returning a MaterialApp configured with theme and home screen.
